data.title: Binance Wallet Launches Sei DeFi Season 2 Campaign with $1.4 Million in Rewards
data.description: Binance Wallet has officially launched the Sei DeFi Season 2 campaign, offering users the opportunity to earn boosted APR from Sei protocols. The campaign includes a prize pool worth $1.4 million.During the event period, eligible users who stake USDC or SEI through designated protocols within the Sei ecosystem will enjoy enhanced APY as part of the promotional rewards.The campaign runs from April 15, 2025, at 00:00 UTC to May 26, 2025, at 23:59 UTC.

data.title: BitMart contracts will list KERNEL and WCT
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart Contract will launch KERNEL/USDT perpetual contract at 17:00 (UTC+8) on April 15, 2025, and WCT/USDT perpetual contract at 19:00 (UTC+8) on April 15, 2025
KernelDAO is a re-staking ecosystem on the Ethereum and BNB chains, and its products cover re-staking and automatic reward generation. By achieving shared security and maximizing the utility of staked assets such as ETH, BTC and BNB, it enhances the network security, liquidity and reward generation of the entire ecosystem.
The WalletConnect network is an on-chain user experience (UX) ecosystem that provides 150 million connections for 600 wallets, 40,000 application projects and 23 million users on all blockchains.

data.title: BitMart will list WallectConnect (WCT)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch WallectConnect (WCT) at 19:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on April 15, and the WCT/USDT trading pair will be opened.
Walletconnect is an open source network that connects users to decentralized applications through a secure and interoperable protocol.

data.title: Bank of America survey: Global investors sell U.S. stocks at record pace
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Bank of America Global Research said on Tuesday that global investors have cut their holdings of U.S. stocks by a record amount in the past two months, believing that the trade war that triggered a global recession is the biggest risk facing the market. In Bank of America's monthly survey of fund managers, the proportion of respondents who reduced their net allocation to U.S. stocks was 36%, the highest level in nearly two years. In two months, the allocation to U.S. stocks fell by 53 percentage points, the largest two-month drop in history. This trend seems to continue, as a record number of respondents also said they intend to cut their allocation to the U.S. stock market. Trump's aggressive tariff plan triggered a sell-off in U.S. assets, including stocks, the dollar and U.S. Treasuries. Stocks rebounded on Monday, but the S&P 500 is still down about 8% so far this year. Bank of America surveyed 164 investors who manage $386 billion in assets. (Jinshi)

data.title: Solana DEX Trading Volume Surpasses Ethereum
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from DeFiLlama reveals that Solana's decentralized exchange (DEX) trading volume reached $2.509 billion in the past 24 hours, surpassing Ethereum's DEX trading volume of $1.895 billion. This marks a significant achievement for Solana, positioning it ahead of Ethereum in terms of DEX activity.

data.title: US Vice President Vance: The US and the UK are likely to reach a "great deal" on trade
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - US Vice President Cyrus Vance said the United States and the United Kingdom are likely to reach a "great deal" on trade. In Trump's initial tariff announcement, the United Kingdom was not subject to the harshest penalties because the trade relationship between the two sides was basically balanced. Nevertheless, British imports to the United States are now subject to a 10% tariff, while the UK's steel and automotive industries are subject to a 25% tariff. Officials from the two countries have been negotiating for weeks, with an initial focus on strengthening cooperation in artificial intelligence and technology, but it may also expand to food and other goods. (Jinshi)

data.title: SEC Delays Decision on Staking in Spot Ethereum ETFs
data.description:
The United States securities regulator has delayed its decision on permitting staking in spot Ethereum exchange-traded funds.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/sec-delays-decision-on-staking-in-spot-ethereum-etfs/

data.title: Federal Reserve's May Interest Rate Decision: Probabilities Assessed
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from CME's 'FedWatch' indicates a 16% probability that the Federal Reserve will cut interest rates by 25 basis points in May, while there is an 84% chance that rates will remain unchanged.

data.title: The probability of the Fed cutting interest rates by 25 basis points in May has dropped to 16%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to CME's "Fed Watch" data, the probability of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates by 25 basis points in May is 16%, and the probability of maintaining unchanged is 84%.
